runners.formComment: Won two starts back over 400m at Warragul. Last start he finished 4th on April 8 over 435m at this track behind She's Salty beaten 3.5 lengths (24.93) in a Grade 5. Draw likely to suit. Has clocked a scorching 18.45 here at this trip. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Visibly eased entering home straight.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at this track (25.06) in a Grade 5, finishing a 2.5 lengths second. Placed at all three starts from this draw. Expected to go close.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last time but prior to that was in the money twice in a row including a narrow loss two back when second (23.04) over 400m at Geelong. Drawn a inside box but will need to find best.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 435m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Happy enough to avoid.

runners.formComment: Finished third (19.90) at Healesville last time at big odds, making it three placings in a row. Jumps from the outside. Top-three aspirations.

runners.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 1.3 lengths fourth (23.53) over 400m at Warragul. Look for improvement. Not out of it.
